description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with a low-pitched, overhanging roof and a mix of white and wood-paneled exterior walls. Large glass windows and sliding doors dominate the front facade, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The structure includes a spacious wooden deck with lounge chairs, partially shaded by a slatted pergola, and is surrounded by a well-maintained grassy yard with several mature trees. The roof is composed of two intersecting planes, creating a dynamic, asymmetrical silhouette. The rear and side elevations are more enclosed, with vertical window slits and wooden paneling providing privacy. The overall setting suggests a comfortable, contemporary residence designed for relaxation and outdoor enjoyment.
description: A modern bungalow with intersecting low-pitched roofs, large glass windows, wood paneling, and a spacious deck shaded by a pergola, set amidst a grassy yard with mature trees.
description_view_0: Rear view showing white walls with vertical window slits and the intersecting roof planes, with trees lining the left side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large glass windows, sliding doors, wooden deck with lounge chairs, and pergola, with trees in the background.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the roof, wood paneling, and a more enclosed facade with minimal windows and tall, narrow trees.
description_view_3: Back corner view with dense tree coverage partially obscuring the bungalow, showing the roof's asymmetry and some wood paneling.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing glass panels and vertical side windows
